title: Angela
writer: Dennis O'Keefe, Edoardo Anton, Steve Carruthers
actors: Dennis O'Keefe, Mara Lane, Arnoldo Foà
plot: Angela (Mara Lane), secretary to an important businessman in Italy, Bertolati (Nino Crisman, is an attractive and sophisticated girl, which is sufficient cause for Steve Catlett (Dennis O'Keefe ), an American car salesman, to fall...
